# FTC Disclosure Blocks (templates — v0)

Referenced by RISK_REGISTER §17. Use verbatim; do not soften.

## A. Member outcome / testimonial / graduation showcase
Required on ANY post that shows or implies a member's trading or learning
outcome (including cohort-graduation posts, screenshots, quotes):

> [Member] is a TradeGame community member. Their experience is their own and
> is not typical or guaranteed — most people who trade lose money. TradeGame
> is education, not financial advice, and showcases learning progress, not
> trading profits. [If any relationship exists: "Member receives X from
> TradeGame" — e.g., a coach role, early access, cosmetics.]

Rules: never showcase PnL, account size, or returns — showcase process
milestones (drills completed, journals kept, scenarios debriefed). If the
outcome can't be framed as process, don't post it.

## B. Paid / granted relationship (partner, tool, token, broker — if ever)
Required at the TOP of the content, not buried:

> Disclosure: TradeGame [received payment / was granted tokens / has an
> affiliate relationship] from [party]. This content is education, not an
> endorsement or a recommendation to use, buy, or trade anything.

Rule: per RISK_REGISTER §20, named-token content stays mechanics-only and
never evaluative, disclosure or not.

## C. Standard footer (all public marketing/social posts)
> Education, not financial advice. Trading involves risk of significant loss.
> Simulated results are not real trading. No signals, ever.
